title: Mike Barry
compiled_truth: Mike Barry is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-15 to 2002-02-22), Mike Barry sent 2 and received 233 emails, totalling 235 interactions. Top correspondents: [Drew Fossum](people/drew-fossum) (1), [Mary Miller](people/mary-miller) (1), [Steven January](people/steven-january) (1), [Dave Neubauer](people/dave-neubauer) (1), [Doug Aschwege](people/doug-aschwege) (1).
